name: Thermonuclear
short_description: Thermonuclear is a fast-paced arcade shooter inspired by classic Cold War–era action games, featuring nuclear-themed combat and score-driven gameplay.
detailed_description:
Classic Arcade Shooter Action

Thermonuclear is a retro-inspired arcade shooter focused on fast reflexes, high scores, and relentless action. Drawing inspiration from classic Cold War–era arcade games, it delivers straightforward, no-nonsense shooting gameplay built around mastery and repetition.

The game emphasizes quick reactions, precise movement, and efficient enemy clearing rather than complex systems or long narrative arcs.

Fast, Score-Driven Gameplay

Each session is designed to be intense and replayable. Players fight through waves of enemies while managing escalating difficulty and chasing higher scores. Success comes from learning patterns, improving reaction time, and optimizing performance.

Thermonuclear is ideal for players who enjoy short, high-intensity play sessions or classic arcade-style challenges.

Retro Tone and High-Energy Atmosphere

The game’s visual and thematic style leans into nuclear tension and retro aesthetics, reinforcing its arcade roots. Everything is built to support rapid gameplay loops and repeat play.

This is a single-player arcade experience designed for players who value challenge, speed, and replayability.

Key Features

  • Retro-inspired arcade shooter gameplay

  • Fast-paced, reflex-based combat

  • Score-driven design focused on replayability

  • Nuclear-themed visuals and atmosphere

  • Short, intense play sessions

  • Single-player arcade experience
